turns.content: I'd like to return an item please.
I can help you with that. To process your return, I'll need your order ID and the SKU of the item you'd like to return. Could you please provide those?
The order ID is ORD-10031. I don't have the SKU handy right now. The return is for the hiking backpack.

Great! I've found your order. The hiking backpack (SKU: HB-220) is eligible for return. The return policy for outdoor gear allows returns within 30 days, provided the item is in its original packaging and unused.

What is the reason for the return?
The backpack is too small and doesn't fit my gear.

Your return for the Hiking Backpack (SKU: HB-220) from order ORD-10031 has been successfully created. Your return ID is RET-9EE076.

You can find your shipping label at https://shipping.example.com/labels/RET-9EE076. Please pack the item securely and drop it off at any shipping location.

Is there anything else I can assist you with today?
TERMINAL_STATE: return_created
